title: CLI dead code and bug fixes
goal: Fix evolution.ts missing cwd bug at 2 call sites, remove v3 no-op functions and their dispatcher calls, remove stale record.sections fallbacks, and deduplicate readInputData in mission.ts
acceptance_criteria: evolution.ts gap-assessment passes { cwd } to writeJsonFile
evolution.ts rules-update passes { cwd } to writeJsonFile
checkMemoryPromotion and checkStaleMemoryRefs removed from post-write-checks.ts
Dispatcher calls to removed functions removed from post-write-checks.ts
Module header comment updated to remove references to removed functions
record.sections fallback removed from health.ts and post-write-checks.ts
mission.ts local readInputData replaced with import from lib/input.ts
